# Copilot Instructions

This repository is developed inside a dev container. Use these defaults when assisting with code changes and local commands.

## Environment

- The dev container includes an up-to-date version of `git` on the `PATH`.
- The dev container includes `node`, `npm`, and `eslint` on the `PATH` for Node.js and JavaScript tasks.
- The dev container includes `python3` and `pip3` on the `PATH`, with Python language tooling available.
- The workspace runs in a dev container on `Debian GNU/Linux 12 (bookworm)`.

## Browser

- Use `"$BROWSER" <url>` to open a webpage in the host default browser.

## Common CLI Tools

Tools available on `PATH` include: `apt`, `dpkg`, `git`, `curl`, `wget`, `ssh`, `scp`, `rsync`, `gpg`, `ps`, `lsof`, `netstat`, `top`, `tree`, `find`, `grep`, `zip`, `unzip`, `tar`, `gzip`, `bzip2`, `xz`.
